chapter_title.en: The Prohibition of Discussing, Debating, and Arguing about Allah

text: : حدثنا في بن إبراهيم بن هاشم، عن أبيه، عن ابن أبي عمير، عن عبد الله بن بكير، عن زرارة، عن أبي عبد الله عليه السلام قال: إن ملكا عظيم الشأن كان في مجلس له فتكلم في الرب تبارك وتعالى ففقد فما يدري أين هو.

en.sayed-ali-raza-rizvi: 19. My father said: `Ali ibn Ibrahim ibn Hashim said, on the authority of his father, on the authority of Ibn Abu `Umayr, on the authority of `Abd Allah ibn Bukayr, on the authority of Zurarah, that Abu `Abd Allah al-Sadiq (AS) said: “Verily, there was once a great king started to discuss the Essence of the Lord, Blessed and Exalted be He. As a result, he went missing, and it is not know what became of him.
